Open manuals are also dynamic works that can be adapted to suit the needs of other institutions or groups that wish to explore the topic but do not have a solid framework to do so. The resulting OER is being piloted in human anatomy labs in Fall 2018 and will be revised following the pilot period with input from current students and lab instructors. It is our hope that this extension of HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL XI

In the International Museum of Surgical Science, Chicago, IL Wilk’s class will open the door to connecting our courses to broader collaborations and student input. ABOUT THE AUTHOR Dr. Malgosia Wilk-Blaszczak has taught human anatomy and human physiology courses for 3
